title: Simply m'Ore
description:
Add more Ores, Gems, Tools & Armor to your Minecraft experience. W.I.P. current test releases before 1.0 out now. 

Current Version: 0.40
body:
Wanting to add more ores to your game without all the extra complications? Then this mod is/will be for you. As of right now seeking testers to give opinions on appearance and currently added ores/gems.

Art to be redone for certain ingots/armor to better match/ look more appealing. 
More balancing/ores/gems to come.

0.40 - All armors/ores can be crafted/smelted/spawn. (Greenockite does not gen, mb)
[Greennockites purpose has not yet been implemented so it's ok for now, does not affect crafting the 17 initial armor sets] 
0.40 - Released for [1.21,1.20.6,1.20.4] (Tested on 1.20.4) Neoforge only for the time being.

0.45 In progress [All Tools to be added]

Discord to be added shortly! Wiki will also be created.

![BetterlookingOverview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb1f8f1ee2c9d040a8f35f82dc557f842b10f1be.png)

Currently Craftable:
Emerald Ingot
Lapis Ingot
Amethyst Ingot
Bismuth Tools
Platinum Tools
Update 0.40 - All 17 current Armor Sets Craftable.

Currently Smeltable into ingots:
All ores should work to get ingots already if applicable.

All Ores/Gems Should spawn in the world, none but 1 have below 0 variants yet but the art for them is ready. 

I recommend JEI or similar to see recipes. (Will test). 
[Update: Will be gotten to at some point to display recipes]

Much balancing will be done but it shouldn't be anything crazy, most hardness based off moh's already.

I plan to add more once I finish all of these!
Planned for future releases:
ORE:
Tellurium
Cobaltite (Cobalt)
Bauxite (Aluminum) 
Magnetite (Mohs hardness of 5–6)
Meteorite Base Block
Osmium
(Meteorite Ore) Iridium
(Meteorite Ore) Taenite  (Nickel)
(Meteorite Ore) Kamacite (Iron)

GEMS:
Garnet
Agate
Aquamarine

Malachite
Moonstone
Sunstone
Peridot
Tanzanite
Bloodstone
Jasper
Dunite (Olivine) 

ITEMS/ETC:
Steel Ingot (Charcoal + PigIron Ingot)
PigIron Ingot (Iron Ore in Blast Furnace)
Bronze Ingot (Tin Ingot + Copper Ingot)
Indium Ingot (Sphalerite)
Cadmium Ingot (Greenockite Crystals)
Cobalt Ingot (Cobaltite)

Blocks:
Ironsand (Magnetite)
Meteorite (Iridium) (Taenite) (Kamacite)

Will do my best.

The two sets of tools are not balanced completely and do not appear in the custom creative tab and must be crafted.

Ores spawns will be rebalanced until I get it just right. 

Much of the art is ready for many things and just needs to be implemented. 
Others such as some of the toolsets need to be made.

Current EA [EarlyAccess] Test Release: 0.40
